title: Uranium
body:
# ☢️ Too Much FPS? Uranium Will Fix That! 💚

Ever thought your game runs *too smoothly*? **Uranium** is here to help—by turning your silky frames into a **slideshow**.

> 🟢 **Drops your FPS to 1** so you can truly appreciate every frame.

## 📸 See Uranium in Action:
![RAM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45e96ba1c45c06e482d001355390eb714cb6feb3_0.webp)


![FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2c7961b7f37537ab9bebb357ecbee0d06c2d72c.png)


![circle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/979f67fb1526eea491d77bb322f967c09379d720.png)


![not circle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b366074e5e16c66fb9e3589f62e910693af0cf83.png)


---

## ✨ Why Uranium?
- Pushes your PC to the **limit (and beyond)**.
- Perfect for **screenshots, chaos, and tech showcases**.
- Work with **every mod**.
- You didn’t really need those extra frames, did you?

---

> Isn’t it beautiful? 😉
